Siapakah Pencipta manusia    &   dunia ?   Banyak orang mengakui bahwa Pencipta Dunia  itu antara lain    :    Maha  Kuasa ,  Maha  Kasih.        Pemilik  Dunia  =  Pemilik  Akhirat
   Pengatur  Dunia  =  Pengatur  Akhirat

As an Indonesian, I couldn't be more proud of Timo Tjahjanto. Every time he makes an insane action movie, I'm there to see it. He's one of the best Indonesian filmmakers working today, with an incredible career to back it up. There's a reason Hollywood recruited him to direct the Nobody 2

Timo is incredible. The fact he put Saul, Doc Brown and Wu Tang (RZA) in a movie together (despite the original being directed by  Ilya Naishuller) is incredible ... and to see RZA finally wield a samurai, speaks to every Wu Tang fan!

Please tell me we are seeing a resurgence of fun mindless action films...

I'm an 70's/80's kid who misses just going to the theater to see 90 minutes of one-liners, explosions and no heavy handed messaging...

We all know the good guy is going to win, that the kid gets saved, the bad guy gets iced and there will be no less than three explosions that will randomly occur...  But I will happily spend my money if the movie is fun.
